info.name: Wandr AI Travel Planner
info.description:
Single-endpoint API. Send a plain-English travel query, get a complete trip plan back.

One request. No polling. No session IDs.

Start the server first:
  uvicorn web.server:app --reload

Then hit POST /api/trip.

variable.description: Change this if the server is running elsewhere (ngrok URL, deployed URL, etc.)

request.description: Verify the server is running before sending a trip request.

Send a plain-English travel query. All 5 agents run in sequence:
  1. Destination — country facts + travel overview
  2. Weather     — 7-day forecast for your travel dates
  3. Budget      — FX conversion + daily category breakdown
  4. Itinerary   — day-by-day plan with timings and tips
  5. Packing     — weather-aware packing list

The response is returned once all agents have completed (typically 30–90 seconds).

Fields in the request body:
  query (required) — any natural-language travel request

response.name: 200 — Complete Trip Plan
403 — Not a travel query
500 — Agent error
